_comment: Current model outputs (v6 after Sprint 9 debt_sizing_method fix). Source: ProjectInputs.create_default_oborovo() + cached_run_waterfall_v3. NOT Excel-verified — model calibration in progress.

metadata.note: Updated after Sprint 9: debt_sizing_method='gearing_cap' now used. Old fixture (v5) had debt=37,017 from DSCR-only method. New fixture shows debt=43,614 from gearing_cap method.

note: This fixture captures the CURRENT state of the model. Excel-verified targets are in oborovo_golden.json. The model currently deviates from Excel — see deviations map.

deviations.summary: Sprint 9 fix: debt_sizing_method='gearing_cap' now gives debt=43,614 vs Excel 42,852 (+1.78%). Project IRR still +0.66pp above Excel (8.62% vs 7.96%). TUHO still has equity_irr -1.60pp below Excel (10.01% vs 11.61%).

tolerances._comment: Tolerances for regression testing. Relaxed for calibration in progress.
